2026/05/26 22:01:00.950711647 function (file = if (onefile) "Rplots.pdf" else "Rplot%03d.pdf",
2026/05/26 22:01:00.950720521 width, height, onefile, family, title, fonts, version, paper,
2026/05/26 22:01:00.950753140 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,
2026/05/26 22:01:00.950754101 useKerning, fillOddEven, compress)
2026/05/26 22:01:00.950771757 {

2026/05/26 22:01:00.950782664 new <- list()
2026/05/26 22:01:00.950783114 if (!missing(width))
2026/05/26 22:01:00.950791948 new$width <- width
2026/05/26 22:01:00.950792378 if (!missing(height))
2026/05/26 22:01:00.950807571 new$height <- height

2026/05/26 22:01:00.950822994 new$onefile <- onefile
2026/05/26 22:01:00.950823805 if (!missing(title))
2026/05/26 22:01:00.950838107 new$title <- title
2026/05/26 22:01:00.950838898 if (!missing(fonts))
2026/05/26 22:01:00.950854161 new$fonts <- fonts
2026/05/26 22:01:00.950854972 if (!missing(version))
2026/05/26 22:01:00.950868162 new$version <- version
2026/05/26 22:01:00.950868953 if (!missing(paper))
2026/05/26 22:01:00.950880750 new$paper <- paper
2026/05/26 22:01:00.950881191 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/05/26 22:01:00.950894631 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/05/26 22:01:00.950895382 if (!missing(bg))
2026/05/26 22:01:00.950905607 new$bg <- bg
2026/05/26 22:01:00.950915813 if (!missing(fg))
2026/05/26 22:01:00.950916524 new$fg <- fg
2026/05/26 22:01:00.950928612 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/05/26 22:01:00.950929533 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/05/26 22:01:00.950942172 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/05/26 22:01:00.950942633 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/05/26 22:01:00.950960199 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/05/26 22:01:00.950960630 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/05/26 22:01:00.950976764 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/05/26 22:01:00.950977495 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/05/26 22:01:00.950987119 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/05/26 22:01:00.950999998 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/05/26 22:01:00.951001170 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/05/26 22:01:00.951020840 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/05/26 22:01:00.951021350 if (!missing(compress))
2026/05/26 22:01:00.951033609 new$compress <- compress
2026/05/26 22:01:00.951034049 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/05/26 22:01:00.951045246 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/05/26 22:01:00.951045797 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/05/26 22:01:00.951074370 enc <- family$encoding
2026/05/26 22:01:00.951075311 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/05/26 22:01:00.951090904 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/05/26 22:01:00.951091696 "default"))
2026/05/26 22:01:00.951108190 old$encoding <- enc
2026/05/26 22:01:00.951108961 family <- family$metrics
2026/05/26 22:01:00.951122341 }
2026/05/26 22:01:00.951123303 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/05/26 22:01:00.951136323 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/05/26 22:01:00.951145416 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/05/26 22:01:00.951146147 if (length(family) == 4L) {
2026/05/26 22:01:00.951159647 family <- c(family, "Symbol.afm")
2026/05/26 22:01:00.951160388 }
2026/05/26 22:01:00.951171896 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/05/26 22:01:00.951172316 }
2026/05/26 22:01:00.951180859 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/05/26 22:01:00.951181270 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/05/26 22:01:00.951190844 if (is.null(pf))
2026/05/26 22:01:00.951191285 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/05/26 22:01:00.951209512 domain = NA)
2026/05/26 22:01:00.951210273 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/05/26 22:01:00.951223333 }
2026/05/26 22:01:00.951229462 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/05/26 22:01:00.951230273 old$family <- family
2026/05/26 22:01:00.951242972 }
2026/05/26 22:01:00.951243473 version <- old$version
2026/05/26 22:01:00.951251815 versions <- c("1.1", "1.2", "1.3", "1.4", "1.5", "1.6", "1.7",
2026/05/26 22:01:00.951252316 "2.0")

2026/05/26 22:01:00.951272827 else stop("invalid PDF version")
2026/05/26 22:01:00.951275871 onefile <- old$onefile
2026/05/26 22:01:00.951288761 if (!checkIntFormat(file))

2026/05/26 22:01:00.951313057 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
2026/05/26 22:01:00.951313888 old$bg, old$fg, old$width, old$height, old$pointsize,
2026/05/26 22:01:00.951328560 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],
2026/05/26 22:01:00.951329051 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,

2026/05/26 22:01:00.951341469 invisible()

2026/05/26 22:01:00.950711647 function (file = if (onefile) "Rplots.pdf" else "Rplot%03d.pdf",
2026/05/26 22:01:00.950720521 width, height, onefile, family, title, fonts, version, paper,
2026/05/26 22:01:00.950753140 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,
2026/05/26 22:01:00.950754101 useKerning, fillOddEven, compress)
2026/05/26 22:01:00.950771757 {
2026/05/26 22:01:00.950772869 initPSandPDFfonts()
2026/05/26 22:01:00.950782664 new <- list()
2026/05/26 22:01:00.950783114 if (!missing(width))
2026/05/26 22:01:00.950791948 new$width <- width
2026/05/26 22:01:00.950792378 if (!missing(height))
2026/05/26 22:01:00.950807571 new$height <- height
2026/05/26 22:01:00.950808362 if (!missing(onefile))
2026/05/26 22:01:00.950822994 new$onefile <- onefile
2026/05/26 22:01:00.950823805 if (!missing(title))
2026/05/26 22:01:00.950838107 new$title <- title
2026/05/26 22:01:00.950838898 if (!missing(fonts))
2026/05/26 22:01:00.950854161 new$fonts <- fonts
2026/05/26 22:01:00.950854972 if (!missing(version))
2026/05/26 22:01:00.950868162 new$version <- version
2026/05/26 22:01:00.950868953 if (!missing(paper))
2026/05/26 22:01:00.950880750 new$paper <- paper
2026/05/26 22:01:00.950881191 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/05/26 22:01:00.950894631 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/05/26 22:01:00.950895382 if (!missing(bg))
2026/05/26 22:01:00.950905607 new$bg <- bg
2026/05/26 22:01:00.950915813 if (!missing(fg))
2026/05/26 22:01:00.950916524 new$fg <- fg
2026/05/26 22:01:00.950928612 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/05/26 22:01:00.950929533 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/05/26 22:01:00.950942172 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/05/26 22:01:00.950942633 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/05/26 22:01:00.950960199 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/05/26 22:01:00.950960630 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/05/26 22:01:00.950976764 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/05/26 22:01:00.950977495 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/05/26 22:01:00.950987119 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/05/26 22:01:00.950999998 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/05/26 22:01:00.951001170 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/05/26 22:01:00.951020840 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/05/26 22:01:00.951021350 if (!missing(compress))
2026/05/26 22:01:00.951033609 new$compress <- compress
2026/05/26 22:01:00.951034049 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/05/26 22:01:00.951045246 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/05/26 22:01:00.951045797 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/05/26 22:01:00.951074370 enc <- family$encoding
2026/05/26 22:01:00.951075311 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/05/26 22:01:00.951090904 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/05/26 22:01:00.951091696 "default"))
2026/05/26 22:01:00.951108190 old$encoding <- enc
2026/05/26 22:01:00.951108961 family <- family$metrics
2026/05/26 22:01:00.951122341 }
2026/05/26 22:01:00.951123303 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/05/26 22:01:00.951136323 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/05/26 22:01:00.951145416 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/05/26 22:01:00.951146147 if (length(family) == 4L) {
2026/05/26 22:01:00.951159647 family <- c(family, "Symbol.afm")
2026/05/26 22:01:00.951160388 }
2026/05/26 22:01:00.951171896 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/05/26 22:01:00.951172316 }
2026/05/26 22:01:00.951180859 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/05/26 22:01:00.951181270 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/05/26 22:01:00.951190844 if (is.null(pf))
2026/05/26 22:01:00.951191285 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/05/26 22:01:00.951209512 domain = NA)
2026/05/26 22:01:00.951210273 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/05/26 22:01:00.951223333 }
2026/05/26 22:01:00.951229462 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/05/26 22:01:00.951230273 old$family <- family
2026/05/26 22:01:00.951242972 }
2026/05/26 22:01:00.951243473 version <- old$version
2026/05/26 22:01:00.951251815 versions <- c("1.1", "1.2", "1.3", "1.4", "1.5", "1.6", "1.7",
2026/05/26 22:01:00.951252316 "2.0")
2026/05/26 22:01:00.951261009 if (version %in% versions)
2026/05/26 22:01:00.951261430 version <- as.integer(strsplit(version, "[.]")[[1L]])
2026/05/26 22:01:00.951272827 else stop("invalid PDF version")
2026/05/26 22:01:00.951275871 onefile <- old$onefile
2026/05/26 22:01:00.951288761 if (!checkIntFormat(file))
2026/05/26 22:01:00.951297764 stop(gettextf("invalid 'file' argument '%s'", file),
2026/05/26 22:01:00.951298495 domain = NA)
2026/05/26 22:01:00.951313057 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
2026/05/26 22:01:00.951313888 old$bg, old$fg, old$width, old$height, old$pointsize,
2026/05/26 22:01:00.951328560 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],
2026/05/26 22:01:00.951329051 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,
2026/05/26 22:01:00.951341039 old$fillOddEven, old$compress)
2026/05/26 22:01:00.951341469 invisible()
2026/05/26 22:01:00.951356712 }
